seoTitle: Jewells vs Jiggi — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Jewells and Jiggi. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Jewells and Jiggi.
heading: Jewells vs Jiggi — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Jewells, New South Wales and Jiggi, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Jiggi has a lower overall climate risk score (42/100) compared to Jewells (47/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Jewells or Jiggi safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Jewells has a flood risk score of 53/100, while Jiggi scores 53/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Jewells scores 54/100 for bushfire risk. Jiggi scores 44/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Jewells or Jiggi?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Jiggi has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.57% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
